caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, wearing a beige vest over a long-sleeved light-colored shirt, delivers a speech from a wooden podium. The sequence begins with a wide shot of a large, tiered assembly hall filled with numerous people seated in rows, under high ceilings with ornate windows. The scene then transitions to a medium shot of the speaker, who stands before a textured green stone wall. He gestures with his right hand raised while speaking into two microphones attached to the podium. In the final segments, he continues his address, shifting his posture and opening both arms wide in an expressive gesture. Beside him stands a tall, cylindrical gold-colored pillar containing floral arrangements. The speaker remains the central focus as he uses hand gestures to emphasize his points against the backdrop of the green stone wall.
